name: Buffalo Bill Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1 pound extra lean ground beef, round or sirloin
recipeInstructions:
1. Shape the beef into 4 burgers.
2. Sprinkle peppercorns and red pepper on both sides of each burger.
3. Coat a nonstick skillet with nonstick spray and warm over high heat.
4. Add the burgers to the skillet and sear them on both sides.
5. Reduce the heat to medium and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Add the beans to the skillet and cook until hot, about 4 minutes.
7. Assemble the sandwiches by placing the burgers in the rolls and topping each with beans.
Per serving
376 calories, 7.1 g fat (17%)
56 mg cholesterol, 511 mg sodium, 1.4 g dietary fiber
